experiment.hypothesis: Filtering invalid derivatives will improve held-out structural quality.
experiment.rationale: The frozen family telemetry attributes most invalid rows to derived examples.
experiment.expected_effect: Higher valid rate and held-out structural similarity.
falsification_criteria: Valid rate or held-out similarity does not improve against the matched control.
stop_conditions: Stop after one deterministic rebuild and matched evaluation.

experiment.hypothesis: Reducing the overrepresented family will recover generalization without hurting parse rate.
experiment.rationale: The frozen per-family scoreboard shows regression concentrated in one oversampled family.
experiment.expected_effect: Positive held-out delta under a constant token budget.
falsification_criteria: Held-out delta is non-positive or smoke parse rate regresses.
stop_conditions: Stop after the matched mixture control completes.

experiment.hypothesis: A longer supervised run on the frozen data will improve competence before RL.
experiment.rationale: All frozen production suites remain below gate and therefore RL cannot provide a safe next step.
experiment.expected_effect: Improved minimum-suite parse and structural similarity.
falsification_criteria: No primary-metric improvement at the fixed evaluation snapshot.
stop_conditions: Stop at the declared step budget or earlier on validation plateau.
